title: add a count of page items in the archive for project tracking or searching
excerpt: It would be very helpful when tracking, cataloging, or searching projects in the archive to have a results count to eliminate having to tally archived projects etc when reviewing or assessing the teams productivity.

posts.author: toddnovak (Todd Novak)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful when tracking, cataloging, or searching projects in the archive to have a results count to eliminate having to tally archived projects etc when reviewing or assessing the teams productivity.
